title: Path To Grass
description: Use a shovel to turn path into grass blocks.
body:
# Path to Grass
Feel free to join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/w7rudpMFqE) if you have questions or issues ### How it works Right click with a shovel on path blocks to turn them back into grass blocks ![Path to Grass Shovel Mod Fabric fabricmod modrinth pathway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tionimos-Mods/Path-To-Grass/refs/heads/main/shovel_to_grass.gif) **You only need this mod on the server side**
